attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The latest version of Gemini, called Gemini 3.1, enhances voice AI technology by improving precision and reducing latency for more seamless audio interactions.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Google DeepMind is addressing the risks of harmful manipulation by AI across critical sectors such as finance and health, resulting in the implementation of new safety measures.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The introduction of Lyria 3 Pro allows users to create longer audio tracks with enhanced structural awareness, and it will now be available across more Google products.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Axiom Math, a Palo Alto startup, has launched a free AI tool aimed at assisting mathematicians in identifying patterns and potentially resolving long-standing mathematical problems.
